common.title: Title
common.noProject: No AI project linked to this notebook yet.
home.title: Pick up recent writing and sources from here.
home.subtitle: Recent pages, study materials, assistant notes, and common entries live here so you can continue without hunting.
home.sections.notebooksBody: Manage every notebook in this workspace and jump into the one you want to continue.
home.sections.recentPagesBody: The newest pages touched across your notebooks so you can resume the freshest work first.
home.sections.continueBody: Pages you edited recently or should keep moving forward.
home.sections.recommendedBody: Suggested pages to reopen based on recent activity.
home.sections.studyBody: Materials you uploaded recently or that just finished chunking and indexing.
home.sections.aiTodayBody: {count} assistant notes were saved today so you can revisit the latest organized work.
home.sections.themesBody: Work threads organized from recently active notebooks.
home.sections.focusBody: Notebooks that stay active over time and likely need ongoing attention.
dashboard.title: Pick up here today.
dashboard.description: Recently edited pages, imported materials, and everyday entries are gathered here.
dashboard.nowBody: Open it in the notebook and keep writing from the same place.
dashboard.recentPagesBody: Sorted by latest edit, each row returns to its original notebook.
dashboard.recentAssetsBody: Materials recently uploaded or indexed, ready to fold into pages.
dashboard.activityBody: Page edits and assistant notes sit in one timeline so you can return to the real context.
dashboard.contextBody: Notebooks you keep reopening show up here as a lightweight work trail.
dashboard.emptyFocus: There is not enough long-running activity to infer focus threads yet.
dashboard.commands.libraryBody: Browse, search, filter, and enter every notebook in one place.
dashboard.commands.settingsBody: Manage account, language, billing, connections, and developer options.
dashboard.commands.newBody: Start a separate workspace for a project, course, or temporary idea.
library.title: Notebook library
library.description: Search, filter, and open the notebooks in this workspace.
library.listBody: Sorted by recent update, with title, type, content counts, and last edit time.
library.shelvesBody: Browse the library like a row of physical notebooks, grouped by recent activity and content state.
library.shelf.continue.title: Continue soon
library.shelf.continue.body: Recently opened or edited notebooks that are ready to resume.
library.shelf.sources.title: Sources to process
library.shelf.sources.body: Notebooks with material ready to digest into pages.
library.shelf.organizing.title: In progress
library.shelf.organizing.body: Notebooks with pages or records that are still being shaped.
library.shelf.rest.title: Other notebooks
library.shelf.rest.body: Quiet notebooks that can stay on the shelf until needed.
library.contextBody: A quick read on what in the library deserves attention.
library.signal.recent.title: Most recent
library.signal.sources.title: Sources to process
library.signal.empty.title: Empty notebooks

library.signal.type.title: Type center
library.emptySearchBody: Try another keyword or clear the type filter.
library.healthBody: Review notebook distribution by type and spot where work, study, and scratch areas are concentrated.

study.decks.empty: No decks yet. Create one above.

study.quiz.question: Question {current} / {total}
study.gen.title: Generate flashcards

study.assets.title: Study materials
study.assets.emptyHint: Upload books, docs, code, slides, images, or any file to start studying
study.workspace.headerTitle: Upload material, inspect generated pages, ask questions, and turn understanding into memory.
study.workspace.headerBody: This workspace follows the full study loop: parse and chunk the source, auto-create notebook pages, let AI explain or summarize it, then keep moving into flashcards and memory.
study.workspace.reviewDisabled: Start a review from the Decks tab first
study.workspace.emptyBody: Upload a book, document, slide deck, or scan. MRAI will parse it, chunk it, create overview and notes pages, and make it searchable inside this notebook.
study.workspace.assetSummary: {status} · {chunks} chunks available in this notebook study pipeline.
study.workspace.generatedEmpty: Generated pages appear here after parsing and chunking finish.
study.workspace.chunksPending: Chunks will show up here when indexing finishes.
study.workspace.pickAsset: Pick a study asset to inspect its generated pages and chunks.
study.workspace.prompts.summary: Summarize the big idea and chapter flow.
study.workspace.prompts.keyIdeas: List the key concepts I should remember.
study.workspace.prompts.confusions: Point out the parts most likely to confuse me.
study.workspace.prompts.memory: Extract the facts worth turning into long-term memory.
study.workspace.assistantBody: Ask questions against {title}, request summaries, or turn the material into memory-worthy takeaways.
study.workspace.assistantEmpty: Start with a prompt or one of the suggested actions. Replies are grounded in this asset's indexed chunks.
study.workspace.assistantPlaceholder: Ask about this material, request a chapter summary, or turn it into study prompts…
study.workspace.assistantHint: Replies stay grounded in the indexed chunks for the selected asset.
study.workspace.assistantDisabled: Finish indexing this asset before asking the assistant.
study.progress.headline.building: Upload and index the first source so this notebook can start a real study loop.
study.progress.headline.indexed: Your material is indexed. The next move is to turn it into recall with flashcards and review.
study.progress.headline.atRisk: {due} card(s) are already due. Clear the queue before the retrieval loop starts slipping.
study.progress.headline.active: You kept the loop moving with {reviewed} review(s) across {activeDays} active day(s) this week.
study.progress.headline.ready: The workspace is primed for another study pass. Push on synthesis, recall, or memory writing next.
study.progress.summary.materials: {indexed} indexed source(s) out of {assets}, {chunks} chunk(s), and {pages} generated notebook page(s) are already available.
study.progress.summary.recall: {cards} card(s) are in circulation, {due} due now, {weak} weak card(s), and {new} still waiting for a first pass.
study.progress.summary.ai: This week: {asks} assistant ask(s), {flashcards} flashcard run(s), {quizzes} quiz run(s), and {confusions} confusion escalation(s).
study.progress.deckPressureEmpty: No active decks yet. Generate flashcards or create a deck to start the recall loop.
study.progress.weakCardsEmpty: No weak cards right now. Your recall queue is clean.
study.progress.recentActionsEmpty: No study actions logged for this notebook in the current 7-day window.
search.window.placeholder: Search pages, files, study, memory, AI actions…
